caption: The video features three men standing side by side, all wearing suits and face masks, likely in a formal or professional setting. The central figure appears to be speaking, as indicated by his mouth movements and the caption "the seventh in January" displayed at the bottom of the screen. The two men flanking him remain still and attentive, suggesting they are part of the same group or event. The background is a plain, textured wall, which adds to the formal atmosphere. The logo "VOA 60 Learning English" in the top left corner suggests that this is an educational segment aimed at teaching English, possibly using news or current events as content. The overall tone of the video seems serious and informative.
